title: SR 12-12 / CA 12-11: Supervisory Letter SR 12-12 / CA 12-11 on         Implementation of a New Process for Requesting Guidance from the Federal Reserve Regarding Bank and Nonbank Acquisitions and Other Proposals  -- July 11, 2012
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 12-12 / CA 12-11 on         Implementation of a New Process for Requesting Guidance from the Federal Reserve Regarding Bank and Nonbank Acquisitions and Other Proposals  -- July 11, 2012
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 12-12 / CA 12-11
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance applies to all institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve, including community banking organizations, defined as institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve with total consolidated assets of $10 billion or less.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
1.  This process applies to all types of proposals requiring submission of an application or notice. Return to text
bm25_text: SR 12-12 / CA 12-11 Supervisory Letter SR 12-12 / CA 12-11 on         Implementation of a New Process for Requesting Guidance from the Federal Reserve Regarding Bank and Nonbank Acquisitions and Other Proposals  -- July 11, 2012 to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance applies to all institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve, including community banking organizations, defined as institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve with total consolidated assets of $10 billion or less. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF BANKING SUPERVISION AND REGULATION DIVISION OF CONSUMERAND COMMUNITY AFFAIRS TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT: 1.  This process applies to all types of proposals requiring submission of an application or notice. Return to text 5.  See http://www.federalreserve.gov/apps/contactus/feedback.aspx. Return to text
